content.en:
At this moment, Han Xuan was really shocked!

She thought she was hiding it well, but she didn't expect it to be seen by her master!

At the first time, she was worried that Shizun wanted to seek that treasure, so she immediately said: "Master, I am indeed reincarnated, but the reincarnation treasure that can reincarnate me will not be used once!"

"I don't need that treasure, you don't have to worry about anything!" Ye Tian said.

However, whether Han Xuan believes it or not, he doesn't know.

"Han Xuan, you are my disciple, don't worry, I will do my best to cultivate you, do you want to quickly comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course I want to!" Han Xuan hurriedly said.

said that she didn't want to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and if she didn't want to, she wouldn't give up the cultivation in her previous life and reincarnate and recultivate!

"I'm a little curious, since you have been reincarnated, you have not left yourself the means to improve your comprehension of the extreme path?" Ye Tian suddenly mentioned.

Han Xuan said helplessly: "I left the means, but I didn't expect to be reincarnated in this place, I don't know much about that reincarnation treasure, because I can choose the place of reincarnation by myself, and the result is random!"

"In this way, I can let you quickly comprehend several extreme extreme paths, and enhance your foundation, after I break through to the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, I can leave the primeval realm realm, you shouldn't be in the realm of the Taigu Origin Realm in your previous life, I can go to the place where you hide the treasures, take your treasures back, and help you improve, how about it?"

"Master, you don't want my treasure, do you?"

Han Xuan was skeptical.

"Ahem, if you give me some, it's okay!" Ye Tian said: "But compared to the benefits I gave you, you won't lose money! I can add nine Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments for you!"

"Impossible!"

Han Xuan said immediately.

She was reincarnated through that reincarnation treasure, but she could only improve her talent to the extent that she contained thirty-six Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, which was the limit, and the Master Zun could also add nine more Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments to her, this was not fooling her!

"You'll know right away, it's a supreme secret art that can be cast a limited number of times, and it comes at a huge cost!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian put one hand on Han Xuan's forehead, and then began to transfer the nine Extreme Dao Ancestors to Han Xuan.

No matter who it was, he could only transfer nine Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments.

Pain!

Han Xuan felt the pain of her soul will, she was already a triple ancestor, and she could still feel this pain, this pain seemed to be able to ignore the realm, even if she became a sixfold ancestor, she had to bear it.

After a long time, Han Xuan was drenched in cold sweat.

At this moment, she had completely accepted the nine Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, and the number of Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments on her body had increased to forty-five.

"There are really nine more Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, and they are not the same as my previous Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments!" Han Xuan gasped, this master had definitely seen through her thirty-six Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, after all, these thirty-six Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments were very common, and none of them were repeated, which showed that Ye Tian was specially selected for the nine Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments.

Being able to increase the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, although she doesn't know what the price her master has paid, this method is too terrifying!

This master is so terrifying!

"Thank you, Master!"

Han Xuan said gratefully.

"Okay, as a teacher, I can only add nine extreme path ancestors for you, you can easily comprehend these nine extreme extreme paths, but after that, you still have to slowly comprehend other extreme extreme paths!" Ye Tian said.

"It's already very good to be able to have nine more extreme poles!"

Han Xuan said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian chatted with Han Xuan and finally understood the origin of her previous life.

"The Heavenly Plains Boundary!"

This was the place where she was in her previous life, and the primeval realm boundary was still several districts separated from the middle of the Tongtian Origin Domain boundary, so if she didn't have the cultivation of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, she wouldn't be able to cross back to the Tongtian Origin Realm realm at all, and she couldn't go back by herself now.

As for what realm Han Xuan was in her previous life, she didn't disclose it, and Ye Tian didn't ask more.

However, Ye Tian felt that Han Xuan's previous life was very likely to be in the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm.

Another period of time has passed, and Han Xuan has already comprehended the nine extreme extreme paths, and after adding the nine extreme path ancestors, her comprehension has improved, which makes her more confident in comprehending the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths.

Before you know it, the 500,000 years of the Primordial Era have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already fused more than two hundred and twenty will clones, and his strength was much stronger than in the past.

If he fought Changbai Dao Ancestor again at this moment, he would definitely be able to easily defeat Changbai Dao Ancestor.

this day.

Ye Tian took Han Xuan out of this Middle Origin Domain, while instructing, he wandered around, collecting resources by the way, he had been to many High Origin Domains, and he did not attract the attention of other Sixfold Origin Ancestors.

......

Swire Daomeng.

Changbai Dao Ancestor and many other sixfold ancestors began to project again, but this meeting was not related to Ye Tian, but involved another sixfold ancestor.

"The Qinglong Dao Ancestor has been hit hard and returned to the Qinglong High Origin Domain, you should all know this news. "

"I know, and this heavy blow is not an ordinary heavy blow, it is a regression in cultivation, he fell back to a half-step sixfold ancestor, and he may not be able to recover!"

"If the Qinglong Dao Ancestor can't recover, he is a half-step sixfold ancestor, and he is not qualified to be a member of the Taigu Dao Alliance, should we kick him out?"

"Give him time, within the 10 million Origin Domain Era, if he can't recover, he will no longer be a member of the Ancient Dao Alliance!"

"I think the trouble of Qinglong Dao Ancestor now is not to recover, but to save his life, he has a very strong temperament and has killed too much, after returning to the Qinglong Origin Domain this time, the news of his cultivation has been spread, I don't know who spread it, maybe it is one of you. At present, there is a half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor planning to attack and kill the Qinglong Dao Ancestor, after all, he has a lot of good things on him!"

"Anyway, we can't participate in the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, this is the rule of the Ancient Dao Alliance, he is now in the half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor can't make a move!"

"Understood!"

......

Qinglong High Plains.

At this moment, the Qinglong Dao Ancestor was already hiding.

"Damn, even a half-step Sixfold Ancestor dares to assassinate me!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor is now very seriously injured, he came back just to heal his injuries, but the news was exposed, and a top half-step six-fold Origin Ancestor attacked and killed him, although the other party failed, he did not kill him, let him escape.

Now, he didn't dare to stay in his Dao Palace, he had to hide, otherwise there would definitely be a lot of half-step sixfold ancestors who wanted to kill him.

"The Ancient Dao Alliance didn't even help me, and even summoned me to restore 10 million Origin Realm Eras, otherwise they would kick me out, a bunch of bastards!"

Qinglong Dao Ancestor decided to just do it, but he also knew that he might not necessarily return to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, and this time his foundation was completely destroyed!
